globalNews.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
globalNews.summary: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyprus -flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.

globalNews.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
globalNews.summary: Donald Trump paid tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

globalNews.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
globalNews.summary: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, local media reports.

globalNews.title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
globalNews.summary: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.

globalNews.title: At least two killed in Toronto street festival shooting
globalNews.summary: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.

cryptoNews.title: Pakistan crypto chief seeks dialogue after scholar rules against crypto payments
cryptoNews.summary: Pakistan’s virtual-assets regulator called for continued dialogue on the treatment of digital assets after meeting an Islamic scholar who backed a ruling against purchases made with crypto.

cryptoNews.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
cryptoNews.summary: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the PoS networks studied.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin bulls Michael Saylor, Adam Back slam BIP-110 Ordinals proposal
cryptoNews.summary: The ongoing debate comes despite a broad downturn in Ordinals transaction activity over the last two years.

cryptoNews.title: Empery Digital shares rise after selling Bitcoin to fund AI data center project
cryptoNews.summary: The sales come months after a major Empery shareholder demanded the firm ditch its Bitcoin treasury strategy and force the resignation of its CEO and board.

aiNews.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
aiNews.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

aiNews.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
aiNews.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedb

aiNews.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
aiNews.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

aiNews.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
aiNews.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models

aiNews.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
aiNews.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.
